case_title: LAN LE VS. JOSE BLANCO et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LE, LAN AS TO DEFENDANT BLANCO, JOSE DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT BLANCO, JOSE
